name: Change password (logged-in)

Add POST /api/v1/auth/change-password (requires current password, argon2id re-hash, invalidate other sessions), Zod schema in shared, and a Change Password section on /settings. Integration tests: wrong current password 401/400, success re-login, other sessions invalidated. Independent of and simpler than GH-41 (reset flow).
result: POST /api/v1/auth/change-password (rate-limited, requireAuth): changePasswordSchema in shared, AuthService.changePassword verifies current password, argon2id re-hash, deletes all other sessions. Settings page Change Password form with client-side confirm check. 5 integration tests (success + old password rejected, wrong current 400 INVALID_PASSWORD, short password VALIDATION_ERROR, other-session invalidation with current kept, 401 unauthenticated). 208/208 tests, lint/typecheck clean.

name: Collapse getById N+1 into 3 set-based queries

name: Web Proxy Hardening
description: Harden hooks.server.ts: (1) Header allowlist on the API proxy — only forward cookie, content-type, accept, accept-language; drop x-forwarded-*, authorization, host, origin, referer. (2) Cache /auth/me per session cookie with 30s TTL using module-level Map to avoid a backend round-trip on every sub-request. (3) Invalidate cache on successful POST /auth/logout. Addresses security review findings #1 and #2. UPDATE (2026-07-14 repo eval): additionally, skip the /auth/me lookup entirely for proxied /api/* requests — the API authenticates those itself, so the pre-flight auth fetch is pure overhead (currently doubles backend round-trips on every API call). Cheaper than caching for that path; the 30s cache still helps SSR page loads.
result: Proxy hardening landed in commit c9e79f9: header allowlist, 30s auth cache with logout invalidation, and /api/* requests skip the auth pre-flight. 203/203 tests green.

commit.message: feat(web): harden API proxy — header allowlist, auth cache, skip pre-flight

name: API Best Practices Hardening
description: Harden the Fastify API against common Node.js issues: graceful shutdown (10s grace via close-with-grace), Zod env validation at startup (process.exit on bad config), COOKIE_SECURE boolean env var replacing NODE_ENV checks, centralized error handler returning generic 500s, Pino logger with header redaction, and robust SQLite UNIQUE constraint matching by .code instead of message string.
result: All six API hardening improvements implemented in a single commit alongside testing improvements. Zod validates env config at startup; graceful shutdown handles SIGTERM/SIGINT; error handler logs and returns standardized responses; logger redacts sensitive headers; SQLite errors matched by code. All 145 tests pass.

commit.message: feat: complete testing gap coverage and API best practices hardening

name: Fastify Schema and Response Types
description: Four-phase overhaul making Zod response schemas the single source of truth across the stack. Phase 1: add Zod schemas to shared package, derive TypeScript types from them (fixes latent Date bug). Phase 2: parse API responses with Zod in web SSR load functions. Phase 3: add JSON Schema definitions to all 42 Fastify routes to activate fast-json-stringify serialization. Phase 4: housekeeping — plugin names, @fastify/sensible, setNotFoundHandler, ownership utilities refactor.
result: All four phases complete. Zod schemas are now the single source of truth for entity types across shared, web, and API packages. All 42 Fastify routes have fast-json-stringify schemas. All 192 tests pass with zero type errors.

commit.message: feat(api): add Fastify response schemas and housekeeping (Phases 3 & 4)

Replace the locally-defined CardItem/ListItem/Archived* interfaces with existing @kanbang/shared types (CardWithProgress, ListWithCardsDetail). Safety net: e2e/lists-and-cards.spec.ts and e2e/done-column.spec.ts exercise this page heavily — run pnpm test:e2e.

Extracted ListColumn.svelte (handles both regular and Done columns — removed ~350 lines of duplicated markup), BoardCard.svelte, ArchivedPanel.svelte under lib/components/board/. Local interfaces replaced with @kanbang/shared CardWithProgress/ListWithCardsDetail. Full E2E suite (34 tests), 203 unit/integration tests, lint and typecheck all green. Optional ChecklistSection extraction from CardDetailModal deferred.

name: API Perf: lightweight ownership checks, N+1 removal, explicit auto-archive
description: Three related backend perf/correctness fixes in @kanbang/api. (1) verifyBoardOwnership/verifyListOwnership in src/utils/ownership.ts call BoardService.getById(), which loads the full board (all lists, all cards, per-card checklist counts) AND runs the auto-archive UPDATE as a side effect — on every ownership-checked mutation. Replace with a lightweight BoardService.getOwnerId(boardId) single-row select, preserving 404-vs-403 semantics. (2) BoardService.getById has N+1 queries: one query per list for cards plus one query per card for checklist progress (~56 queries for a 5-list/50-card board). Collapse to 3 set-based queries (lists by board, cards by board, checklist progress grouped by cardId) assembled in JS. (3) Auto-archive of stale done-cards is a hidden write inside getById (a getter). Extract to explicit archiveStaleDoneCards(boardId) called only from the GET /boards/:boardId route. Verify with existing integration tests (403/404 ownership paths are covered); all 198 tests must stay green.
result: All three perf fixes landed in commit e5e4a52. 198/198 tests, lint and typecheck clean.

commit.message: perf(api): lightweight ownership checks, N+1 removal, explicit auto-archive

name: In-memory /auth/me cache with 30s TTL
description: Add module-level Map<sessionCookie, {user, expiresAt}> in hooks.server.ts. resolveUser() checks cache, fetches on miss/expiry. Failures fall through to locals.user=null and are NOT cached.
result: Module-level Map cache with 30s TTL and 500-entry sweep; failures not cached. Additionally, proxied /api/* requests skip the /auth/me pre-flight entirely.

result: All seven work packages completed via parallel agents. Critical auth middleware fixed; 16 code duplication sites removed; rate limiting added; accessibility improved. All 154 tests pass with no type errors.

name: Card 'Completed' Checkbox
description: Add a boolean completed field to cards with a square checkbox UI. Checkbox is hidden by default, revealed on card hover when unchecked; always visible when checked. Completed card titles are dimmed to 0.6 opacity. Prerequisite for the Done column auto-move feature.
result: Completed checkbox added to cards with hover-reveal UI, title dimming, and full test coverage. The completed field became the foundation for the Done column's auto-move feature.

commit.message: feat: add completed checkbox to cards

name: Password reset flow
description: Forgot password page with email-based reset tokens. Requires SMTP setup.

name: Calendar view
description: Cards plotted by due date in a calendar view.

name: Collapse state management with localStorage
description: Load/save collapse state per board in localStorage. Toggle function. Collapsed lists excluded from drag-drop drop targets.
result: localStorage-based collapse state implemented per board.

commit.message: feat: add list collapse to minimize lists into narrow vertical strips

name: Guest access
description: Add users to a single board without full workspace membership.

name: Mount ErrorIndicator in +layout.svelte + unit tests
description: Add <ErrorIndicator /> to nav-right in packages/web/src/routes/+layout.svelte (left of username). Add errorStore.test.ts (add/clear/cap) and extend api.test.ts (500 adds entry, network failure adds null-status entry, 2xx leaves count 0).
result: Implemented in commit 1b8ca17: mounted in +layout.svelte, unit tests in errorStore.test.ts

commit.message: feat(web): add global error indicator with store and header badge

name: Recurring cards
description: Auto-create cards on a schedule.

name: DB migration + shared types + validation
description: Add completed boolean column (default false) to cards schema. Add to shared Card type and Zod validation schema.
result: DB migration and shared types updated.

commit.message: feat: add completed checkbox to cards

name: Phase 2: Wire Zod schemas into web SSR load functions
description: Update web package load functions to parse API responses through Zod schemas for runtime type safety.
result: Web SSR load functions now parse responses through Zod schemas.

commit.message: feat(web): wire Zod response schemas into web SSR load functions (Phase 2)

name: Done list + Appearance sections (via later plans)
description: Done list selector section wired during Done column plan. Appearance section wired during board background plan.
result: Done list section added when Done column feature landed.

commit.message: feat: add board settings modal with rename and archive actions

name: Done Column
description: Special 'Done' list per board: opt-in via board settings. When a card's completed flag is set to true it auto-moves to the Done list. Cards in the Done list completed 3+ days ago are auto-archived at page load (no background job). Done list has checkmark icon, reduced opacity, collapsed-by-default visual treatment. Cannot archive Done list while designated.
result: Done column feature fully implemented: auto-move on card completion, page-load auto-archive after 3 days, board settings modal integration, and visual treatment for the Done list. Separate frontend/backend parallel implementation.

commit.message: complete done column work

name: Add Node engines guard to prevent ABI mismatch confusion
description: Running tests under the wrong Node version fails with 122 confusing better-sqlite3 NODE_MODULE_VERSION errors; .nvmrc says 25. Add "engines": { "node": ">=25" } to root package.json and engine-strict=true in .npmrc so the failure is instant and self-explanatory.
result: engines.node tightened to >=25 (was >=20, which let Node 22 through to ABI crashes) and engine-strict=true added to .npmrc. Verified: pnpm under Node 22 now fails instantly with ERR_PNPM_UNSUPPORTED_ENGINE.

commit.message: chore: enforce Node >=25 via engine-strict

name: Markdown rendering in card descriptions
description: Card descriptions are plain textarea text. Render descriptions as markdown in CardDetailModal view mode (edit stays a textarea). Use a small md renderer; sanitize output (XSS) — e.g. marked/markdown-it + DOMPurify or a Svelte markdown component with sanitization. Keep raw text in DB unchanged.

name: Card quick-edit
description: Hover shows pencil icon, clicking opens inline popover to edit labels, due date, members, and title without opening the full card modal.

name: API route: PATCH /lists/:id/done + board detail auto-archive
description: New endpoint for designating Done list. Board detail endpoint triggers auto-archive pass on load.
result: PATCH /lists/:id/done endpoint and board-load auto-archive implemented.

commit.message: complete done column work

name: Board Settings Modal
description: Centralized board-level configuration modal accessible via gear icon in board header. Initial sections: General (rename + archive), Done list selector, and Appearance placeholder. No new DB table needed — settings use existing endpoints. Designed to be extended incrementally by future feature plans.
result: Board settings modal implemented as a reusable component with gear icon trigger. General section handles rename and archive. Done list and Appearance sections added incrementally by their respective feature plans.

commit.message: feat: add board settings modal with rename and archive actions

name: DB migration + shared types: isDone on lists, completedAt on cards
description: Add isDone boolean to lists table. Add completedAt timestamp to cards. Update shared types and Zod schemas.
result: DB migration applied; isDone and completedAt columns added.

commit.message: complete done column work

name: Card numbering
description: Auto-incrementing card IDs scoped to the board (like GitHub issues, e.g. #47).

name: Shared package: BACKGROUND_GRADIENT_PRESETS constant
description: New file packages/shared/src/background-presets.ts exporting BACKGROUND_GRADIENT_PRESETS readonly array of {id, name, css} and BackgroundGradientId type. Export from package barrel.

name: UI text, Docker, and documentation
description: Update display text in Svelte templates, Dockerfile labels, docker-compose service names, and all docs.
result: UI, Docker, and docs all updated to KanBang branding.

name: Service layer: setDone, getDoneList, auto-move on card update
description: ListService.setDone() and getDoneList(). CardService.update() auto-moves card to Done list when completed=true. Page-load auto-archive pass for 3-day-old completed cards.
result: Service layer auto-move and auto-archive logic implemented.

commit.message: complete done column work

name: Invite links
description: Shareable URL granting access at a specified role level, with ability to disable/regenerate.

name: Keyboard-accessible card move
description: svelte-dnd-action is mouse-only (documented gap in board page comment). Add a Move option to the card (context of card detail modal or card menu): pick target list + position, calls existing PATCH /cards/:id/move with a computed fractional position. Closes the a11y gap and helps mobile.

name: Data export/backup (JSON)
description: Self-hosted app needs app-level backup. GET /api/v1/export returning all boards/lists/cards/checklists/checklist-items for the authenticated user as a single JSON document, plus an Export button on /settings that downloads it. Consider Content-Disposition attachment with dated filename. Integration test asserting shape and user isolation.
result: GET /api/v1/export (requireAuth): ExportService.exportUserData builds nested boards→lists→cards→checklists→items (5 set-based queries, archived included). Content-Disposition attachment with dated filename kanbang-export-YYYY-MM-DD.json. Settings page Export section with download link (proxied, cookie auth). 4 integration tests: full nested shape + header, archived inclusion, user isolation, 401. 212/212 tests, lint/typecheck clean.

commit.message: feat(api): JSON export of all user data

name: Tests: shared snapshot, API integration (invalid/valid backgrounds), E2E happy path
description: Unit test snapshots preset list. API integration tests: reject invalid hex, reject unknown gradient ID, accept valid color/gradient, accept null. E2E: pick gradient in settings, reload, verify persisted.

name: WP3+WP4: Remove unused types + doc fixes
description: Remove 5 unused type exports from shared package. Fix documentation inaccuracies across spec files.
result: 5 unused type exports removed; doc fixes applied.

commit.message: fix: apply code review findings across all packages

name: Due date status utility + DatePicker component
description: packages/web/src/lib/utils/due-date.ts computing status (neutral/yellow/red/green) from timestamp and completed flag. DatePicker component with <input type=date>.
result: due-date.ts status utility and DatePicker component implemented.

commit.message: feat: add due dates to cards with visual status badges

name: Default due date reminder
description: Board-level setting for when notification reminders fire (e.g. 1 day before due).

name: Extract archiveStaleDoneCards from getById
description: Move the auto-archive UPDATE (cards completed 3+ days ago in Done lists) out of BoardService.getById into archiveStaleDoneCards(boardId). Call it from the GET /boards/:boardId route handler before fetching the board. done-column integration tests must stay green.
result: Auto-archive extracted to archiveStaleDoneCards(boardId), called only from GET /boards/:boardId route. done-column tests green.

commit.message: perf(api): lightweight ownership checks, N+1 removal, explicit auto-archive

name: Activity log
description: Audit trail of all changes per card and board.

name: Archive Instead of Delete
description: Replace all permanent delete operations with soft-archive/unarchive for boards, lists, and cards. Independent archive state per item (no cascade — archiving a board does not cascade to its lists/cards). Display logic hides children transitively. Added archived boards section on listing page and archived items panel within boards.
result: Archive-instead-of-delete fully implemented across the stack. archived_at columns added to boards/lists/cards; all service layers replaced delete with archive/unarchive; API endpoints updated; frontend added archive actions and archived items panels. All 149 integration tests pass.

commit.message: feat: implement archive instead of delete for boards, lists, and cards

name: WP1+WP2: Auth fix + helper extraction
description: Fix auth middleware early return on 401. Extract validateOwnership and validateBoardOwnership helpers to eliminate 11 validation + 5 ownership duplications.
result: Auth middleware fixed; ownership helpers extracted and used across all routes.

commit.message: fix: apply code review findings across all packages

name: Invalidate auth cache on logout + proxy hardening tests
description: Delete cache entry when proxy sees successful POST /auth/v1/auth/logout. Add Vitest tests: x-forwarded-for not forwarded, cookie+content-type are forwarded, two same-session requests = one /auth/me call, logout clears cache.
result: Logout proxy success deletes cache entry. 5 new Vitest tests in packages/web/tests/hooks.server.test.ts cover allowlist, cache hit, no negative caching, logout invalidation, and /api/* skip.

commit.message: feat(web): harden API proxy — header allowlist, auth cache, skip pre-flight

name: Board search
description: Highlights matching cards in place (dims non-matching), does not navigate away from the board.
